Battle for Nova Rush

Dewblossom.name: 露华花 Dewblossom

Detect Prey.name: 侦测猎物 Detect Prey
Detect Prey.description:
触发 一个生物进入露华花 60 英尺内

效果 露华花敏感的根系网络侦测到由 PCs 的移动产生的振动。露华花张开其诱引之花；100 英尺内的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:15] 豁免。若失败，该生物必须用其下一个动作尽可能移动到靠近露华花的位置（若为重度失败，则必须用其接下来的两个动作）。然后，露华花掷先攻。

Trigger A creature comes within 60 feet of the dewblossom

Effect The dewblossom's sensitive root network detects vibrations created by the PCs' movements. The dewblossom opens its luring flower; creatures within 100 feet must attempt a @Check[will|dc:15] save. On a failure, the creature must spend its next action to move as close to the dewblossom as possible (or its next two actions on a critical failure). Then, the dewblossom rolls initiative.

Thorn Dart.name: 荆棘飞镖 Thorn Dart
Thorn Dart.description:
触发条件 60尺内的一个生物用一次攻击对露花造成伤害

效果 露花向触发生物发射一枚荆棘飞镖。目标受到 @Damage[1d4[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:17|basic] 豁免）。

Trigger A creature within 60 feet damages the dewblossom with an attack

Effect The dewblossom fires a thorn dart at the triggering creature. The target takes @Damage[1d4[piercing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:17|basic] save).

Rancid Grip.name: 腐臭之握 Rancid Grip
Rancid Grip.description:
目标被困在露花兽挤压的花朵中，获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}状态，直到其[[/act escape dc=17]]{挣脱}。在目标处于被擒抱期间的每个回合结束时，目标受到@Damage[(1d6+3)[poison]]伤害。

The target is trapped in the dewblossom's crushing flower, gaining the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} condition until it [[/act escape dc=17]]{Escapes}. At the end of each of the target's turns that it remains grabbed, the target takes @Damage[(1d6+3)[poison]] damage.

Dewblossom.disable:
@Check[athletics|dc:14]（受训）可与露华花的藤蔓角力，@Check[acrobatics|dc:14]（受训）可绕着它闪避，@Check[nature|dc:13]（受训）可诱使这朵花停止攻击；总共需要四次成功才能停用该隐患，或者对露华花造成足够的伤害使其生命值降至一半（以先发生者为准）。任何在这些检定中成功的生物，对其攻击的豁免和 AC 获得 +2 处境加值。

@Check[athletics|dc:14] (trained) to wrestle the dewblossom's vines, @Check[acrobatics|dc:14] (trained) to dodge around it, @Check[nature|dc:13] (trained) to entice the flower to cease its attacks; four total successes are required to disable the hazard, or dealing enough damage to the dewblossom to reduce it to half its HP (whichever comes first). A creature who succeeds at any of these checks gains a +2 circumstance bonus to saves and AC against its attacks.
Dewblossom.hazarddescription:
一股芬芳的香气吸引着感官，走向一张由柔软苔藓铺成的平滑床面。其中央，一朵美丽的花正在绽放，以捕捉光线——它那闪烁如天鹅绒般的花瓣几乎已完全展开。花蕊以缓慢的螺旋运动卷曲伸出，而那诱人的香气也变酸，化作腐臭肉类与粪便的恶臭。

A fragrant aroma beckons the senses toward a smooth bed of soft moss. In its center, a beautiful flower is opening to catch the light—its shimmering velvet petals have nearly unfurled. A stamen curls out in slow spiral motion, and the alluring scent sours to the stench of rancid meat and feces.
Dewblossom.reset:
露华花在被解除作用、侦测到猎物 1 分钟后、生命值降至一半时，或当其受害者陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识} 时，会停止攻击。它会吐出受害者（如果对方仍清醒），将根拔起，把叶片裹在身体周围，并以每轮 100 英尺的陆地速度滚走。它会在 1 小时后重置（如果它需要消化这顿食物，则为 1 天后）。

The dewblossom stops attacking when it's disabled, 1 minute after it detects prey, when it's reduced to half HP, or when its victim is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}. It spits out its victim (if conscious), uproots, tucks its leaves around its body, and rolls away with a land speed of 100 feet per round. It resets after 1 hour (or 1 day if it needs to digest its meal).
Dewblossom.routine:
（1动作）露华花对最近的生物进行一次藤蔓攫取攻击。

(1 action) The dewblossom makes a vine snatch attack against the nearest creature.

Entangling Mycelia.name: 缠结菌丝 Entangling Mycelia
Entangling Mycelia.description:
被蕈爪兽的爪击打中的生物会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1} 状态，持续 1 轮。

Creatures hit by a shroomclaw's claw Strike are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round.

Pounce.name: 猛扑 Pounce
Pounce.description:
蘑爪移动，并在该移动结束时进行一次打击。若蘑爪开始此动作时处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}状态，则它在完成其打击后才会失去隐匿。

The shroomclaw Strides and makes a Strike at the end of that movement. If the shroomclaw began this action @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, it remains hidden until after its Strike.

Suppressing Spores.name: 抑制孢子 Suppressing Spores
Suppressing Spores.description:
蕈爪兽在自身周围释放一个@Template[type:burst|distance:10]的孢子爆发，对区域内所有非蕈爪兽生物造成 @Damage[1d4[poison]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:13|basic] 豁免）；若重度失败，该生物将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 状态，持续1分钟。蕈爪兽在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Suppressing Spores]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用压制孢子。

The shroomclaw releases a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] of spores around itself that deal @Damage[1d4[poison]|options:area-damage] damage to all non-shroomclaw creatures in the area (@Check[fortitude|dc:13|basic] save); on a critical failure, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} for 1 minute. The shroomclaw can't use suppressing spores again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Suppressing Spores]]{1d4 rounds}.

Archivist's Wrath.name: 档案守卫者之怒 Archivist's Wrath
Archivist's Wrath.tokenName: 档案管理员之怒 Archivist's Wrath

Intruder Alert!.name: 入侵者警报！ Intruder Alert!
Intruder Alert!.description:
触发条件 档案管理员404侦测到入侵者

效果 隐藏在墙壁、地板和天花板中的数十个微型节点释放出万花筒般的激光齐射，对档案库404内所有非硬光生物造成 @Damage[1d6[fire]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:15|basic] 豁免）。然后该隐患掷先攻。

Trigger Archivist 404 detects intruders

Effect Dozens of tiny nodes concealed in the walls, floor, and ceiling unleash a kaleidoscopic barrage of lasers that deal @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage to all non-hardlight creatures in Archive 404 (@Check[reflex|dc:15|basic] save). Then the hazard rolls initiative.

Laser.name: 激光 Laser
Laser.description:
无多重攻击减值

no multiple attack penalty

Archivist's Wrath.disable:
@Check[computers|dc:13]（受训）可覆盖安全程序；@Check[crafting|dc:15] 或 @Check[thievery|dc:15]（受训）可使硬光投影仪失效；@Check[diplomacy|dc:17] 可说服档案管理员重新考虑。总共需要四次成功才能终止该程序。

@Check[computers|dc:13] (trained) overrides the security program; @Check[crafting|dc:15] or @Check[thievery|dc:15] (trained) disables the hardlight projector; @Check[diplomacy|dc:17] convinces the Archivist to reconsider. Four total successes are required to end the program.
Archivist's Wrath.hazarddescription:
这套由监控摄像头、壁挂式可折叠炮塔和激光网组成的安保系统由档案管理员404控制，他会命令它们毫不留情地轰击入侵者。

This network of security cameras, wall-mounted retractable turrets, and laser nets are controlled by Archivist 404, who commands them to blast intruders with extreme prejudice.
Archivist's Wrath.reset:
每过 6 小时，若投影仪已被禁用，一个备用程序就会将档案管理员404的原始人格数据恢复到该投影仪中。

Every 6 hours, a backup program restores Archivist 404's original personality data to the projector if it's been disabled.
Archivist's Wrath.routine:
（1 个动作）Archivist 404 以一个动作向档案库中的每名入侵者发射一束激光。PC 每成功进行一次使其失效的检定，它的攻击检定就会承受累积的 –1 状态减值。

(1 action) Archivist 404 fires one laser at each intruder in the archive as one action. It takes a cumulative –1 status penalty to its attack rolls for each successful check the PCs have made to disable it.

Hardlight Dragonet.name: 硬光幼龙 Hardlight Dragonet

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术先天法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Adhere.name: 遵命 Adhere
Adhere.description:
你在你触碰的一个无人看管的物体（或你正持握的一个物体）与该物体所接触的另一个物体或表面之间创造出分子键。要将该物体从那个表面上拉开，必须成功进行一次对抗你法术 DC 的 Athletics 检定，以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{强行开启}。

如果你改为触碰一个无人占据的 5 尺方格，则该表面会充满具有黏附性的魔法。该空间变为高等困难地形。

You create a molecular bond between an unattended object you touch (or an object you're holding) and another object or surface that object is touching. Pulling the object free of that surface requires a successful Athletics check against your spell DC to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open}.

If you instead touch one unoccupied 5-foot square, that surface becomes charged with adhering magic. That space becomes greater difficult terrain.

Akashic Download.name: 阿卡夏下载 Akashic Download
Akashic Download.description:
你对阿卡西记录执行一次灵能检索，以获取关于某个特定主题的信息，并将这些数据以魔法方式传输到你的通讯器或计算机中。当你施放此法术时，选择一项你已受训且具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 动作的技能。

在持续时间内的任意时刻，当你使用所选技能尝试进行一次回忆知识检定时，你都可以查阅你的通讯器。此次检定获得 +1 状态加值。查阅你的通讯器是回忆知识动作的一部分。你必须手持该通讯器才能这样做。通讯器会立即汇编并显示与该主题相关的各种媒体中的片段与摘录，从而给予你该加值。如果你在此次检定中掷出大失败，则改为失败。如果该检定成功且对象是一个生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。你一旦查阅了通讯器，此法术便结束。当法术结束时，你对阿卡西记录的访问也随之结束，而你下载的所有信息都会返回阿卡西记录。

升阶（3环） 在法术结束前，你可以查阅你的通讯器三次。

You execute a psychic search of the Akashic Record for information about a specific topic and magically transfer this data to your comm unit or computer. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you're trained that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action.

Any time during the duration, you can consult your comm unit while attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This check gains a +1 status bonus. Checking your comm unit is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must be holding the comm unit to do so. The comm unit instantly compiles and displays snippets and selections from various media relevant to the topic, which grants you the bonus. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the check is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference the comm unit, the spell ends. When the spell ends, your access to the Akashic Record ends, and all the information you downloaded returns to the Akashic Record.

Heightened (3rd) You can reference your comm unit three times before the spell ends.

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你将注意力集中于目标，收集数据，同时魔法全息影像显示出相关信息。施法完成后，你会获知目标的生物识别信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况以及其他基础生理信息。你，或任何你告知过该分析结果的人，在伪装成该生物、对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}，以及对其进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 的检定时，获得 +1 状态加值。若目标是虚幻的，或处于幻觉魔法的效果之下，只有当该效果的环阶低于你的分析目标法术的环阶时，你才能侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环） 处境加值提升至 +2，且你的目标最多可以为 10 个生物。

升阶（6环） 处境加值提升至 +3，且你可以将任意数量的生物作为目标。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to Impersonate the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

Heightened (3rd) The circumstance bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The circumstance bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Delete.name: 删除 Delete
Delete.description:
你以一个浮夸的魔法手势从一个设备或物体中删除数据。这些数据可以是手写、印刷或数字形式。你最多可以删除相当于1,500个词的文本、一页内容，或一个显示屏上的文本或其他视觉信息。无人看管的物体中或其上的非魔法文字会被自动删除。尝试进行一次反制检定来删除数字或魔法文字。如果你未能删除作为一个危险一部分的文字，你会触发该危险。这不能用于删除法术书或类似用于储存魔法公式或法术的手段中的内容。

如果你的目标是一个具有追踪（特征）的有人持用科技物品，尝试进行一次反制检定。成功时，该物品变为故障 1。持有该物品的生物可以执行交互动作来重启软件，使故障值降低1。

强化（7环） 你可以删除存储在单个设备或书籍中的所有本地数据，或删除设备或书籍上与某个特定名称、主题或类别相关的所有数据。

You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一阵脉冲，以感知魔法的存在。除了魔法存在与否之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品与持续生效的法术。只有当幻术魔法的效果环阶低于你的侦测魔法法术的环阶时，你才能侦测到该幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环） 你会得知此法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的环阶或等级，由GM判定。

升阶（4环） 如同3环，但你还会锁定最高环阶魔法的来源。类似于不精确感官，你不会得知其确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体内（若其大于此范围，则为最近的那个）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Measure.name: 测量 Measure
Measure.description:
你会得知你在该区域内能够观察到的生物和物体的大致测量数据（长度、宽度、深度、高度和重量）。如果一个物体或生物延伸出该区域，你只会得知区域内部分的测量数据，而无法得知任何你观察不到的部分。例如，你无法确定一堵你只能观察到单侧的墙的厚度或重量，也无法确定超出该法术范围的水体的深度。每次你维持该法术时，你会得知区域内一个生物或物体的精确测量数据，包括可能表明结构脆弱性的细微偏差或异常。被魔法改变的目标会向你提供反映你所观察到内容的信息，而非准确的测量数据。

升阶（+1） 将测量的范围延长100英尺。

You learn the approximate measurements (length, width, depth, height, and weight) of creatures and objects you can observe in the area. If an object or creature extends out of the area, you learn only the measurements within the area, but nothing about what you can't observe. For example, you can't determine the thickness or weight of a wall you can observe only one side of, or the depth of water that extends beyond the spell's range. Each time you Sustain the spell, you learn the exact measurements of one creature or object in the area, including imprecisions or anomalies that might indicate structural weakness. Magically altered targets give you information that reflects what you observe rather than accurate measurements.

Heightened (+1) Extend the range of measure by 100 feet.

Summon Robot.name: 召唤机器人 Summon Robot
Summon Robot.description:
你召唤一个具有科技特征、等级为–1的生物为你而战。

升阶 如召唤特征中所述。

You summon a creature that has the tech trait and whose level is –1 to fight for you.

Heightened As listed in the summon trait.

Data Barrage.name: 数据齐射 Data Barrage
Data Barrage.description:
120尺内每个能察觉到龙崽的敌人都会受到 @Damage[1d6[mental]] 伤害，因为龙崽以令人头晕目眩的速度向敌人的思维中发射事实与数据点（@Check[will|dc:16|basic] 豁免）；若重度失败，该生物会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续1分钟。随后，这些目标会在24小时内暂时免疫数据弹幕。

Each enemy within 120 feet that can perceive the dragonet takes @Damage[1d6[mental]] damage as the dragonet fires facts and data points at enemy minds with dizzying speeds (@Check[will|dc:16|basic] save); on a critical failure the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 minute. The targets then become temporarily immune to Data Barrage for 24 hours.

Static Breath.name: 静电吐息 Static Breath
Static Breath.description:
幼龙喷吐一道 @Template[type:line|distance:5] 电流。在任意科技装置 30 尺范围内时，这会改为一道 @Template[type:cone|distance:10] 电流。区域内的每个生物受到 @Damage[1d10[electricity]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:16|basic] 豁免）。幼龙在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Static Breath]]{1d4 轮} 内不能再次使用静电吐息。

The dragonet breathes a @Template[type:line|distance:5] of electricity. Within 30 feet of any tech device, this becomes a @Template[type:cone|distance:10] of electricity instead. Each creature in the area takes @Damage[1d10[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:16|basic] save). The dragonet can't use Static Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Static Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Super Quick.name: 超快 Super Quick
Super Quick.description:
当全息光幼龙施放法术时，它可以作为该活动的一部分进行5尺踏步或疾行。

When the hardlight dragonet Casts a Spell, they can Step or Stride as part of the activity.

Lore (any one subcategory).name: 学识（任一子类别） Lore (any one subcategory)

Hardlight Dragonet.publicNotes:
硬光小龙的外形会因制造商的喜好而各不相同，但其中许多都被塑造成矮壮、腹部圆鼓的龙形身躯，配有强韧的翅膀、虬结的犄角，以及带刺的尾巴。硬光小龙被创造出来用于守卫档案馆并执行辅助性任务，是其所模仿生物的更为敦实的版本。硬光小龙被编入了龙类式的、热衷于收集信息的性情。它们以掌握自己所看守的档案、数据库和图书馆的百科全书式知识为荣，也喜欢极为细致地讨论其中档案或典籍的内容。聪明或狡诈的潜入者会利用硬光小龙的这一弱点，引诱它们泄露敏感信息，或让它们从岗位上分心，好让擅长潜行的同伙实施他们的计划。

硬光小龙以及其他虚拟生物，例如硬光小恶魔和活体全息影像，有时可能会被困在队伍作为战利品获得的某件物品中。有时，这类虚拟生物会出现在通讯单元、数据板上，甚至寄生于法术芯片中。通常，它们是被前任持有者编码并存储在其中以充当助手，或者因恶意代码损坏，若不进行一次计算机检定来排查问题或破解权限，便无法运作。在极少数情况下，这样的生物是作为数字病毒的一部分渗入了计算机或物品。受感染的虚拟生物可能会给它们的新伙伴同时带来好处与坏处。

小龙与魔法

硬光小龙对魔法深深着迷——它们少数几个能够施放的法术对它们而言极其珍贵，就像孩子看待自己最喜爱的毛绒玩具，或收藏家看待自己最有价值的交易卡一样。硬光小龙喜欢看别人施放法术，尤其是那些它们从未见过的法术；除非别无选择，否则它们不愿攻击施法者。

Hardlight dragonets vary in appearance depending on their manufacturer's tastes, but many are sculpted with squat, potbellied dragon bodies, sinewy wings, gnarled horns, and spiny tails. Created to guard archives and perform assistive tasks, hardlight dragonets are stockier versions of the creatures they were designed to resemble. Hardlight dragonets are programmed with a draconic enthusiasm for collecting information. They take pride in maintaining encyclopedic knowledge of the archives, databases, and libraries they watch over, and they love to discuss the contents of the files or tomes therein in intimate detail. Clever or deceitful infiltrators use this weakness against a hardlight dragonet, enticing them to spill sensitive information or distracting them from their post while stealthy allies carry out their schemes.

Hardlight dragonets and other virtual creatures, such as hardlight scamps and living holograms, might sometimes be trapped within an item a party receives as loot. Sometimes virtual creatures are found on comm units, datapads, or even infesting spell chips. Typically, they've been coded and stored there by a previous owner to act as an assistant or been corrupted by malicious code and unable to function without an Computers check to troubleshoot the issue or hack permissions. On rare occasions, such a creature has infiltrated the computer or item as part of a digital virus. An infected virtual creature might present both benefits and drawbacks to their new associate.

Dragonets and Magic

Hardlight dragonets are fascinated by magic—the few spells they can cast are precious to them, similar to how a child might view their favorite stuffed toy or a collector their most valuable trading card. Hardlight dragonets love watching other people cast spells, especially ones they've never seen before, and are reluctant to attack spellcasters unless they have no other choice.

Jinsul Lookout.name: 烬蛛族哨兵 Jinsul Lookout
Jinsul Lookout.tokenName: 烬蛛族瞭望者 Jinsul Lookout

Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).name: 燃烧手榴弹（商用） Incendiary Grenade (Commercial)
Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域 火焰

重击 5 英尺

这些手雷使用被点燃的化学物质爆炸，产生强烈热能的爆风，并造成 1d8 火焰伤害，需进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定（@Template[burst|distance:5]）。如果你能使用手雷的重击专精效果，则对燃烧手雷的豁免检定严重失败的生物会被从手雷旁击飞。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 5 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 1d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:5]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Area Fire.name: 区域射击 Area Fire
Area Fire.description:
燃烧手雷 (@Template[type:burst|distance:5], 射程 70 英尺), 伤害 @Damage[1d8[fire]] (@Check[reflex|dc:13|basic])

Incendiary Grenade (@Template[type:burst|distance:5], range 70 feet), Damage @Damage[1d8[fire]] (@Check[reflex|dc:13|basic])

Ocular Scopes.name: 目镜瞄准器 Ocular Scopes
Ocular Scopes.description:
瞭望者配备了覆盖式眼部植入体，使其能够穿透恶劣天气进行瞄准，并通过红外视觉收集数据。瞭望者忽略任何非魔法的隐蔽来源，直到其回合结束。

The lookout overlays ocular implants allowing them to aim through punishing weather conditions and gather data through infravision. The lookout ignores any non-magical sources of concealment until the end of its turn.

Strider Leap.name: 跨越跳跃 Strider Leap
Strider Leap.description:
烬蛛族先进行Stride，然后执行一次@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远}。它的Stride可以少于10英尺，且不会自动在跳远检定中失败。

The jinsul Strides and then performs a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}. It can Stride less than 10 feet and not automatically fail its Long Jump check.

Jinsul Lookout.publicNotes:
胡拉的瞭望员都是新手船员，在漂流崩溃期间首次随这位军阀的舰船出航。

少数零散的烬蛛族群体已在阿巴隆建立了孤立的基地。大多数都是隶属于某名军官的小股士兵小队，而那名军官通常是一位秘学者或战术型领袖，所有人都敬重或畏惧他们，并同意为其效命。

泪滴冰渊烬蛛族

本冒险中的烬蛛族追随一名叫作军阀胡拉的指挥官。当时胡拉正准备对一个由较弱军阀控制的邻近星系发动敌意吞并，眼看就要在近宇大幅扩张其势力——直到漂流危机将他们和其忠诚船员甩进了协约世界星域中阿巴隆上空。坠落在这颗位于敌后纵深、环境恶劣的世界后，胡拉及其追随者为躲避残酷的烈日而逃入地下。烬蛛族逐渐在岩石中凿出隧道，有些人的腿刃甚至磨损得变得光滑，最终才进入了一处地下洞窟——泪滴冰渊。

兵变暗流

随着时间推移，在冰渊的压迫环境下，又要面对自然与超自然的危险物，胡拉及其追随者变得比同族中的其他人更虚弱、更孤立，也更绝望。胡拉的誓刃自幼就被培养来保护他们，如今离他们抛弃自己所信奉的一切、杀死领袖并逃往他处寻找救赎与战利品，只是时间问题。

Hura's lookouts are novice crewmates who were on their first tour with the warlord's vessel during the Drift Crash.

A few scattered groups of jinsuls have established isolated bases on Aballon. Most are small squads of troopers attached to an officer, usually a mystic or tactical leader who they all respect or fear and have agreed to serve.

Teardrop Ice Well Jinsuls

The jinsuls in this adventure follow a commander called Warlord Hura. On the verge of a hostile takeover of a neighboring system controlled by a weaker warlord, Hura was positioned to significantly expand their holdings in Near Space—until the Drift Crisis spat them and their loyal crew out in Pact Worlds space over Aballon. Crashing on an inhospitable world deep behind enemy lines, Hura and their followers fled underground from the brutal sun. The jinsuls gradually carved tunnels into the rock, some wearing their leg blades down until they were smooth, before they finally emerged into an underground cave—Teardrop Ice Well.

Undercurrents of Mutiny

Over time, under the oppressive conditions of the Ice Well, facing hazards both natural and supernatural, Hura and their followers grew weaker, more isolated, and more desperate than others of their kind. It's only a matter of time before Hura's sworn blades—conditioned from birth to protect them—abandon everything they believe in, kill their leader, and flee in search of salvation and spoils elsewhere.

Dire Shroomclaw.name: 恐怖菇爪 Dire Shroomclaw

Entangling Mycelia.name: 缠结菌丝 Entangling Mycelia
Entangling Mycelia.description:
被蕈爪兽的爪击 Strike 命中的生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，持续 1 轮。

Creatures hit by a shroomclaw's claw Strike are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round.

Pounce.name: 猛扑 Pounce
Pounce.description:
蕈爪兽进行Stride，并在该移动结束时进行一次Strike。若蕈爪兽在开始此动作时处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏}状态，则它会保持隐藏，直到其Strike之后。

The shroomclaw Strides and makes a Strike at the end of that movement. If the shroomclaw began this action @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, it remains hidden until after its Strike.

Suppressing Spores.name: 抑制孢子 Suppressing Spores
Suppressing Spores.description:
菌爪兽在自身周围释放一片@Template[type:burst|distance:10]孢子，对区域内所有非菌爪兽生物造成 @Damage[2d4[poison]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:15|basic]豁免）；若重度失败，该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 状态，持续1分钟。菌爪兽在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Suppressing Spores]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用压制孢子。

The shroomclaw releases a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] of spores around itself that deal @Damage[2d4[poison]|options:area-damage] damage to all non-shroomclaw creatures in the area (@Check[fortitude|dc:15|basic] save); on a critical failure, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} for 1 minute. The shroomclaw can't use suppressing spores again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Suppressing Spores]]{1d4 rounds}.

Dire Shroomclaw.publicNotes:
恐怖蕈爪——人们有时会半开玩笑地这么称呼它们——对毫无准备的探险者来说相当危险。它们是机会主义捕食者，虽然会避开大多数经验丰富、装备精良的队伍，但可能会试探新手，或追捕虚弱无力、无法反抗的生物。

最早遇到它们的探险者称这些捕食者为蕈爪；它们已进化得能够在阿巴隆冰渊的寒霜深处繁衍生息。每到春天，蕈爪都会在幽冥地带深处扎根并繁殖。数周后，闪闪发亮的幼崽会从深处现身，浑身皮毛间蠕动着奇异的孢子状增生物，并游荡进营地。那些没有被捕食者猎杀、或没有因利润丰厚的出口生意而遭偷猎的幸存者，会以植物和昆虫为食，迅速长大。

Dire shroomclaws, as they're sometimes jokingly called, can be quite dangerous for unprepared explorers. They're opportunistic predators, and while they avoid most seasoned, well-armed parties, they might test greenhorns or pursue weakened or helpless creatures.

Called shroomclaws by the first explorers who encountered them, these predators have evolved to thrive in the frosty depths of Aballon's Ice Wells. Every spring, shroomclaws take root deep in the Gloaming and spawn. Weeks later, glimmering kittens with strange sporelike growths wriggling throughout their fur emerge from the depths and wander into camps. The survivors that aren't picked off by predators or poached for a lucrative export business grow quickly on a diet of flora and insects.

Shadowy Duplicates.name: 暗影分身 Shadowy Duplicates

Quantum Field.name: 量子场 Quantum Field
Quantum Field.description:
触发条件 阴影般的复制体出现并威胁到PC

效果 这些复制体扭曲现实，制造出一个量子场。该场域是一个以任意复制体100英尺内任一点为中心、半径30英尺的爆发区域，并会被布置为尽可能影响更多PC。该区域为困难地形。然后该危险掷先攻。

Trigger The shadowy duplicates appear and threaten the PCs

Effect The duplicates warp reality, creating a quantum field. This field is a 30-foot-radius burst centered on any point within 100 feet of a duplicate, and it's positioned to affect as many PCs as possible. This area is difficult terrain. Then the hazard rolls initiative.

Mind-Slicing Blast.name: 心灵切裂冲击 Mind-Slicing Blast
Mind-Slicing Blast.description:
没有多重攻击减值

no multiple attack penalty

Shadowy Duplicates.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:14] 或 @Check[occultism|dc:14] 通过将复制体封印出此现实来将其停用，@Check[Engineering Lore|dc:15] 或 @Check[Physical Science Lore|dc:15] 通过矛盾理论使量子场停用，或 @Check[athletics|dc:16] 通过物理力量将复制体停用

@Check[arcana|dc:14] or @Check[occultism|dc:14] to disable a duplicate by sealing it away from this reality, @Check[Engineering Lore|dc:15] or @Check[Physical Science Lore|dc:15] to disable the quantum field with contradicting theory, or @Check[athletics|dc:16] to disable a duplicate by physical force
Shadowy Duplicates.hazarddescription:
一个阴影般身影的四个复制体生成了一片半真实的量子场，扭曲了现实的结构，随后以切裂现实的魔法回响发动攻击。

Four duplicates of a shadowy figure produce a quasi-real quantum field that warps the fabric of reality, then attack with echoes of reality-slicing magic.
Shadowy Duplicates.reset:
这些复制体会在 1 分钟后消失，且不会再次出现。

The duplicates vanish after 1 minute and never reappear.
Shadowy Duplicates.routine:
（4个动作）每有一个分身被摧毁或失能，这些阴影分身每回合便失去1个动作。在该陷阱的每个动作中，一个分身会移动最多20英尺（无视量子场的困难地形），或使量子场移动最多20英尺，然后对40英尺内的一个生物发出一次切裂心智的爆 blast。

(4 actions) The shadowy duplicates lose 1 action each turn for each destroyed or disabled duplicate. On each of the hazard's actions, a duplicate moves up to 20 feet (ignoring the quantum field's difficult terrain) or moves the quantum field up to 20 feet, then emits a mind-slicing blast against one creature within 40 feet.

Anacite Wingbot.name: 新械族飞翼机 Anacite Wingbot
Anacite Wingbot.tokenName: 新械族飞翼机 Anacite Wingbot

Always Watching.name: 时刻注视着 Always Watching
Always Watching.description:
新械族飞翼机会始终录制画面，并通过短波上传其影像流，只要它们处于发射器的范围内。新械族飞翼机可以投射其正在录制的实时画面的全息影像，或回放它们录下的任何内容的视频，这些影像会如同法术 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Ucf8eynbZMfUucjE]{Illusory Scene} 一样出现在附近的空中。

Anacite wingbots are always recording and uploading their feed through shortwave as long as they're within range of a transmitter. An anacite wingbot can project a hologram of the live footage they're recording or play back a video of anything they've recorded, which appears in the air nearby as the spell @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Ucf8eynbZMfUucjE]{Illusory Scene}.

Shortwave.name: 短波 Shortwave
Shortwave.description:
新械族可以使用无线短波信号进行交流。这如同对其他具有短波的生物以及同时具有构装体和科技特征的生物使用心灵感应。

The anacite can communicate using wireless shortwave signals. This functions as telepathy with other creatures who have shortwave and with creatures with both the construct and tech traits.

Sunlight Dependency.name: 阳光依赖性 Sunlight Dependency
Sunlight Dependency.description:
新械族由太阳能驱动；在黑暗区域中他们会永久处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}，并且必须每天在直射阳光下充能，否则就有彻底关机的风险。

Anacites are solar powered; they're perpetually @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1} while in areas of darkness and must recharge daily in direct sunlight or risk shutting down completely.

Nanites.name: 纳米机械体 Nanites
Nanites.description:
被飞翼机的刺击命中的生物必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:13] 豁免。若失败，具有科技特征的生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}；其他生物受到 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害。

Creatures hit by the wingbot's sting must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:13] save. On a failure, creatures with the tech trait become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}; other creatures take @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage.

Trill.name: 颤鸣虫 Trill
Trill.description:
飞翼机发出一种刺耳的颤鸣声，并伴随着令人不安的低频振动和经调谐的电磁脉冲，用以干扰非新械族生物。30尺内的每个非新械族生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:13] 豁免。随后，目标会在24小时内暂时免疫飞翼机的颤鸣。

失败 具有科技特征的生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}，而非科技生物则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 如同失败，但故障或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

The wingbot creates a shrill trilling noise accompanied by disturbing low-level vibrations and electromagnetic pulses tuned to disrupt non-anacite creatures. Each non-anacite creature within 30 feet must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:13] save. The targets then become temporarily immune to the wingbot's Trill for 24 hours.

Failure Creatures with the tech trait become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}, while non-tech creatures become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure As failure, but glitching or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Anacite Wingbot.publicNotes:
新械族飞翼机很常见。飞翼机不过是比无人机强不了多少的存在，由虚拟智能（VI）操控，而这些虚拟智能被编程为服务于洞悉阵列及其代表。遍布阿巴隆大多数超级综合体、规律间隔设置的发射器，使飞翼机能够始终将其持续运行的视频画面记录并传输给负责它们的虚拟智能“处理员”。排列在飞翼机机翼上的太阳能板让它们能够在移动中充能。

自从创造者抛弃新械族以来，在这段漫长岁月中，新械族经历了无数形态与升级，要将其一一记录几乎不可能，因为几乎任何人能想象到的形状与功能，都能在这个勤勉的物种中找到。

许多新械族共享一些常见的设计原则，例如银色的金属身躯、多条腿，以及类似节肢动物的形态。它们通常拥有可抓握的爪击来完成通用任务，不过有些也可能具备适用于极端特定用途的肢体或附器。最基础的新械族，例如飞翼机，由于缺乏自己的心智，因此最有可能呈现出“标准化”的外观，但大多数新械族都是独一无二的。它们的具体职责可能要求某个新械族能够举起沉重货物；在这种情况下，这名新械族看起来可能更像一台叉车而不是虫子，或者兼具两者的特征。新械族文化珍视创新，而大多数新械族也认为自己的身体和程序不应例外，始终乐于尝试新的部件与构造，或下载技能模块来拓展自己的眼界。

在奋进城，最常见的其他类型新械族包括笨重的劳工、瘦长的官僚，以及各种各样的公务人员。在那些主要面向外星访客和有机生命的街区中，一些新械族承担着特殊职责，以使当地对非新械族生命更具吸引力。这类新械族可能会从洞悉阵列接到如下指派：“造访该地区的每一家俱乐部和餐馆”“在公共场所与陌生人交谈”，或者“定期请游客帮忙过马路”。这些被选中的新械族会像对待其他任何职责一样认真对待这些任务。

新械族植入体

几乎所有新械族都会以某种方式强化自己的身体，要么直接提升自己履行其社群中特定职能的能力，要么用独特特征让自己区别于其他新械族。在阿巴隆，这类植入体很容易获得；如果新械族能够证明该植入体会为其社群作出贡献，那么这些植入体往往完全免费。有些新械族会利用这种便利，定期更换自己的植入体。

新械族程序设定

由于它们是机器人，新械族被编程用于专门的任务并具备专门的能力，但每一个都拥有自由意志和复杂的内在生活。每个新械族在制造时也都会被赋予一个目的，而大多数新械族对此都极为认真。在其一生中，新械族很可能会在洞悉阵列的决定下从事不同类型的工作。遵循程序设定并服务于算法，是几乎所有新械族的典范。遵循这些典范会带来满足与愉悦，而违背自身程序的新械族则可能感到内疚，甚至身体不适，

Anacite wingbots are common. Little more than drones, wingbots are piloted by virtual intelligences (VI) programmed to serve Insight Array and their representatives. Transmitters spaced regularly across most of Aballon's megaplexes allow wingbots to record their constantly running video feeds to their VI "handlers" at all times. The solar panels that line a wingbot's wings allow it to recharge while on the move.

Recording the countless forms and upgrades anacites have taken in the long period since their creators abandoned them would be impossible, as nearly every shape and function one might imagine can be found among this industrious species.

Many anacites share common design principles, such as silvery, metallic bodies, multiple legs, and forms that resemble arthropods. They often have grasping claws to accomplish generic tasks, though some might have limbs or appendages suited to extremely specific purposes. The most basic anacites, such as wingbots, who lack minds of their own, are the most likely to look "standardized," but most anacites are unique. Their specific role might dictate that an anacite must be able to lift heavy loads, in which case the anacite might resemble a forklift more than a bug or perhaps have the features of both. Anacite culture prizes innovation, and most anacites view their bodies and programming as no exception, always willing to try new parts and builds or download skill modules to broaden their horizons.

The other types of anacites most often found in Striving include bulky laborers, spindly bureaucrats, and civil servants of all types. In neighborhoods that cater mostly to off-worlders and organics, some anacites have specialized roles to make the area more appealing to non-anacite life. Such anacites might receive assignments from Insight Array to "visit every club and eatery in the area," "chat with strangers in public spaces," or "routinely ask tourists for help crossing the street." These chosen anacites take these roles as seriously as any other.

Anacite Augmentations

Almost all anacites augment their bodies in some way, either to directly enhance their ability to perform their specific function in society or to set them apart from other anacites with a unique feature. On Aballon, such augmentations are easy to come by, and if the anacite can prove the augmentation will contribute to their society, they're often completely free. Some anacites take advantage of this availability to swap their augmentations on a regular basis.

Anacite Programming

Because they're robots, anacites are programmed for specialized tasks and abilities, but each has free will and a complex inner life. Every anacite also has a purpose assigned at manufacture, which most take very seriously. In their lifetime, an anacite is likely to pursue different types of work as determined by Insight Array. Following programming and serving the algorithm are edicts for almost all anacites. Following these edicts brings fulfillment and pleasure, while anacites who go against their programming may feel guilt or even physical discomfort,

Mechanizer Saboteur.name: 机械教徒破坏者 Mechanizer Saboteur
Mechanizer Saboteur.tokenName: 机械教徒破坏者 Mechanizer Saboteur

Integrated Knife.name: 内置刀 Integrated Knife
Integrated Knife.description:
升级： 1

刀具既可作为武器，也可作为工具，价值非凡，其形制、风格与材质多种多样，从星铁到陶瓷，不一而足。

Upgrades: 1

Invaluable as both a weapon and a tool, knives come in a variety of shapes, styles, and materials ranging from starmetals to ceramics.

Microcord Armor.name: 微绳护甲 Microcord Armor
Microcord Armor.description:
升级： 1

这件轻甲由超轻纤维织成，能够随着穿戴者的动作灵活弯曲，但在受到冲击时会变得如钢铁般坚硬。

Upgrades: 1

This light armor is woven from ultralight fibers that flex with a wearer's movements but turn hard as steel on impact.

Cellular Stimulant Spell Amp.name: 细胞刺激法术扩增 Cellular Stimulant Spell Amp
Cellular Stimulant Spell Amp.description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”，法术安瓿是可立即使用的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1 (操纵)

效果 1环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QiW8VNdBf0SFUq69]{细胞刺激剂} 法术（DC 15）

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QiW8VNdBf0SFUq69]{Cellular Stimulant} spell (DC 15)

Betray Tech.name: 背叛科技 Betray Tech
Betray Tech.description:
触发条件 一名机械教徒成为来自带有科技特征的物品或生物的攻击目标

频率 每10分钟一次

效果 机械教徒接入通用代码，使触发的物品变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}（@Check[will|dc:13] 豁免则无效）；如果该物品及持用它的生物都具有科技特征，则此效果影响该物品。

Trigger A Mechanizer is the target of an attack from an item or creature with the tech trait

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect The Mechanizer taps into the universal code, causing the triggering item to become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1} (@Check[will|dc:13] save negates); if both the item and creature wielding it have the tech trait, this affects the item.

Jump.name: 跳跃 Jump
Jump.description:
机械教徒破坏者激活内嵌于其体内的跳跃喷射器，以飞行最多20英尺，最高高度为10英尺，或垂直向上最多20英尺。他们必须在此次移动结束时落地，否则就会坠落。如果跳跃喷射器被从机械教徒的身体上移除，它们就无法运作。

The Mechanizer saboteur activates jump jets installed in their body to Fly up to 20 feet with a maximum height of 10 feet, or up to 20 feet straight up. They must land at the end of this movement or fall. The jump jets don't function if removed from the Mechanizer's body.

Overhead Attack.name: 凌空攻击 Overhead Attack
Overhead Attack.description:
机械教徒用其跳跃喷射器进行跳跃，并在此次移动期间能够到达的任意一点，对一个目标进行一次刀打击或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}。

The Mechanizer Jumps with their jump jets and uses a knife Strike or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} against a target they can reach at any point during this movement.

Plugged Into the Singularity.name: 接入纯一主义 Plugged Into the Singularity
Plugged Into the Singularity.description:
机械教徒破坏者与其他机械升格派之间拥有 120 英尺范围的心灵感应。他们进行破解（Hack）时不需要黑客工具包，并且可以对自己能看见的、120 英尺内的装置进行远程破解。

Mechanizer saboteurs have telepathy at a 120 foot range with other Mechanizers. They don't need a hacker's toolkit to Hack and can do so remotely within 120 feet of a device they can see.

Mechanizer Saboteur.publicNotes:
机械教徒破坏者是热情的新近皈依者，他们的身体仍然部分保留有机结构，看起来还像原本的形态。改造较少的会渗透社区并充当间谍或潜伏特工，而经过重度改装的则是刺客或负责重要任务的士兵。大多数都擅长黑客入侵和渗透。他们只需一个念头就能瘫痪一台机器，但他们的外表常常会让有机体误以为他们并不危险。

没有人真正知道机械升格派的目标是什么。他们声称自己是在迎来纯一主义，而他们相信这将通过他们同名的无线网络到来。然而，他们的行动却让观察者困惑不已。其中最臭名昭著的是他们那种（谢天谢地相当罕见的）仪式性残害狂潮。更常见（也更不值得上新闻）的活动还包括行为艺术、电控机械强化诊所里的“免费升级”，以及大学研讨会。

机械教徒的人格会被备份到纯一主义网络中，他们相信这将成为未来宇宙万物归一的蓝图。如果一名机械教徒死亡，纯一主义会在一周内用回收零件为其生成一具新的躯壳——如果这名机械教徒地位良好，或者参与的是重要行动，时间也许还会更短。

机械教徒的财宝

整合进机械教徒身体内的武器，可以由一名在 @Check[crafting|dc:12] 或 @Check[medicine|dc:12] 检定中成功的角色从尸体上拆除；该角色还必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:12] 豁免，若失败则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} 状态，持续1分钟。一些机械教徒会将珠宝或微芯片嵌入前额，以象征一种科技第三眼；这种装饰有时是星辉武者武器水晶或法术芯片，既能强化他们自身，又能彰显时尚品味。

Mechanizer saboteurs are enthusiastic new converts who still have partially organic bodies that resemble their original forms. The less modified infiltrate communities and act as spies or sleeper agents, while the heavily modded are assassins or troopers handling important missions. Most specialize in hacking and infiltration. They can disable a machine with a thought, but their appearance often fools organics into not perceiving them as a danger.

Nobody really knows what the Mechanizers' goals are. They claim to be ushering in the Singularity, which they believe will come from their wireless network of the same name. Yet their actions baffle observers. Most notorious among these are their (thankfully rare) ritualistic mutilation sprees. More common (and less newsworthy) activities also include performance art, "free upgrades" at cybernetic augmentation clinics, and university seminars.

Mechanizer personalities are backed up to the Singularity network, which they believe will be the blueprint for future universal oneness. If a Mechanizer dies, the Singularity generates a new shell for them using recycled parts in one week—perhaps less, if the Mechanizer was in good standing or involved in an important operation.

Mechanizer Treasure

The weapons integrated into Mechanizers' bodies can be removed from a corpse by a character who succeeds at a @Check[crafting|dc:12] or @Check[medicine|dc:12] check, who must also attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:12] save, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} for 1 minute on a failure. Some Mechanizers embed jewels or microchips into their foreheads to symbolize a technological third eye; this adornment is sometimes a solarian weapon crystal or a spell chip that empowers them while making a fashion statement.

Filthy Fog.name: 污秽之雾 Filthy Fog
Filthy Fog.description:
烟雾小恶魔呼出受污染的空气，形成一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15]，对区域内的每个生物造成 @Damage[1d6[poison]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:16|basic] 豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会暴露于雾肺病。烟雾小恶魔在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Filthy Fog]]{1d4 轮}内不能再次使用“污秽浓雾”。

The smog scamp exhales polluted air in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] that deals @Damage[1d6[poison]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature within the area (@Check[fortitude|dc:16|basic] save). A creature that fails its save is also exposed to foglung. The smog scamp can't use Filthy Fog again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Filthy Fog]]{1d4 rounds}.

Foglung.name: 雾肺菌 Foglung
Foglung.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:13]

潜伏期 1周

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（3天）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（3天）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}，且无法从疲乏状态中恢复，并且剧烈咳嗽使其必须成功通过一次 @Check[flat|dc:13] 才能施放法术或激活物品（1周）

阶段 4 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:13]

Onset 1 week

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (3 days)

Warlord Hura.name: 军阀胡拉 Warlord Hura

Acid Dart Rifle.name: 强酸飞镖步枪 Acid Dart Rifle

Aim.name: 瞄准 Aim
Aim.description:
Hura用其近战或远程武器（选择一种）对60尺内的一个目标进行瞄准。在其本回合的剩余时间内，使用该武器进行的成功攻击会额外造成1d4点精准伤害，并使目标对AC的掩护加值降低1。

Hura aims with their melee or ranged weapon (choose one) against a target within 60 feet. For the rest of their turn, successful attacks made with that weapon deal an additional 1d4 precision damage and reduce the target's cover bonus to AC by 1.

Strider Leap.name: 疾行跳跃 Strider Leap
Strider Leap.description:
烬蛛族先进行移动，然后执行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远}。它进行移动时可以少于 10 尺，且其跳远检定不会因此自动失败。

The jinsul Strides and then performs a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}. It can Stride less than 10 feet and not automatically fail its Long Jump check.

Warlord Hura.publicNotes:
军阀胡拉是一名地位不高的烬蛛族指挥官，在虚假等级体系崩塌后的混沌中趁机夺权。他们依旧贪婪地攫取一切能得到的力量，迫切想弄明白特工Z偷来的遗物是如何运作的；鉴于当前局势，他们一反常态，愿意与路上遇到的非烬蛛族谈判，但胡拉也会毫不犹豫地折磨并背叛任何阻碍其达成目标的人。

少数零散的烬蛛族群体已在阿巴隆建立了彼此孤立的基地。大多数都是隶属于某位军官的小型士兵小队，而那名军官通常是一位秘学者或战术型领袖，所有人都敬畏或惧怕他们，并同意为其效命。

泪滴冰渊烬蛛族

本冒险中的烬蛛族追随一名叫作军阀胡拉的指挥官。胡拉原本正准备对一个由较弱军阀控制的邻近星系发动敌意兼并，大幅扩张自己在近宇的势力——直到漂流危机把他们和其忠诚的部众甩进了协约世界境内、阿巴隆上空。坠落在这颗位于敌后纵深、环境恶劣的星球上后，胡拉及其追随者为躲避残酷烈日而逃入地下。烬蛛族们渐渐在岩石中开凿出隧道，有些人甚至把腿刃磨损得光滑平整，最终才进入了一处地下洞窟——泪滴冰渊。

兵变暗流

随着时间推移，在冰渊的压迫环境下，面对自然与超自然的危险物，胡拉及其追随者变得比其他同族更加虚弱、更加孤立，也更加绝望。胡拉那些自出生起就被训练来保护他们的誓刃，背弃自己所信的一切、杀死领袖、并逃往他处寻求救赎与战利品，只是时间问题。

Warlord Hura is a minor jinsul commander who made a power grab in the chaos after the false hierarchy's fall. Still hungry to acquire whatever power they can, they're desperate to learn how Agent Z's stolen relic works; while they're uncharacteristically willing to negotiate with non-jinsuls who cross their path, given the circumstances, Hura will gladly torture and betray anyone who stands in the way of achieving their goals.

A few scattered groups of jinsuls have established isolated bases on Aballon. Most are small squads of troopers attached to an officer, usually a mystic or tactical leader who they all respect or fear and have agreed to serve.

Teardrop Ice Well Jinsuls

The jinsuls in this adventure follow a commander called Warlord Hura. On the verge of a hostile takeover of a neighboring system controlled by a weaker warlord, Hura was positioned to significantly expand their holdings in Near Space—until the Drift Crisis spat them and their loyal crew out in Pact Worlds space over Aballon. Crashing on an inhospitable world deep behind enemy lines, Hura and their followers fled underground from the brutal sun. The jinsuls gradually carved tunnels into the rock, some wearing their leg blades down until they were smooth, before they finally emerged into an underground cave—Teardrop Ice Well.

Undercurrents of Mutiny

Over time, under the oppressive conditions of the Ice Well, facing hazards both natural and supernatural, Hura and their followers grew weaker, more isolated, and more desperate than others of their kind. It's only a matter of time before Hura's sworn blades—conditioned from birth to protect them—abandon everything they believe in, kill their leader, and flee in search of salvation and spoils elsewhere.

Particle Cannon.name: 粒子炮 Particle Cannon

Charge Up.name: 充能 Charge Up
Charge Up.description:
触发 一名瞭望员发现了威胁

效果 胡拉占据炮手位置。粒子炮掷先攻。

Trigger A lookout identifies a threat

Effect Hura takes the gunner position. The particle cannon rolls initiative.

Particle Cannon.disable:
@Check[crafting|dc:14]（受训）以停用或卡住粒子炮，@Check[arcana|dc:17]、@Check[occultism|dc:17]、@Check[nature|dc:17]或 @Check[religion|dc:17]（受训）以通过利用一种魔法理论或祈祷奇迹般的故障来抵消粒子光束。

@Check[crafting|dc:14] (trained) or @Check[thievery|dc:14] (trained) to disable or jam the particle cannon, @Check[arcana|dc:17], @Check[occultism|dc:17], @Check[nature|dc:17], or @Check[religion|dc:17] (trained) to counteract the particle beam by exploiting a magical theory or praying for a miraculous malfunction.
Particle Cannon.hazarddescription:
飞船船体上睁开了一只怒目而视的紫色眼睛。显露出的炮口内，一座巨型炮塔的三联炮管旋转起来，随后以冷酷无情的效率释放出一道由高浓缩粒子构成的光束。

A glowering purple eye opens in the ship's hull. The triple barrels of a massive turret spin inside the revealed port, then release a beam of concentrated particles with ruthless efficiency.
Particle Cannon.reset:
如果被停用，这门火炮会在 1 轮内处于未激活状态，期间胡拉会排查问题，之后它会恢复射击。如果瞭望员被杀死，或者火炮被停用三次或更多次，胡拉就会停止射击。

If disabled, the cannon is inactive for 1 round while Hura troubleshoots the issue, then it resumes firing. Hura stops firing if the lookouts are killed or the cannon is disabled three or more times.
Particle Cannon.routine:
（2 动作）胡拉从粒子炮发射一发充能射击，对一条 @Template[type:line|distance:90] 内的每个生物造成 @Damage[(1d6+3)[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:14|basic] 豁免）。

(2 actions) Hura fires a charged shot from the particle cannon, dealing @Damage[(1d6+3)[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature in a @Template[type:line|distance:90] (@Check[reflex|dc:14|basic] save).

Sworn Blade of Shields.name: 护盾誓刃 Sworn Blade of Shields
Sworn Blade of Shields.tokenName: 护盾誓刃 Sworn Blade of Shields

Leg Blade Lunge.name: 腿刃突刺 Leg Blade Lunge
Leg Blade Lunge.description:
烬蛛族先跨步，再用腿刃进行攻击，然后跨步回到原位。此次攻击的触及增加至10尺。

The jinsul Steps, Strikes with its leg blade, then Steps to its original position. Its reach increases to 10 feet for this attack.

Strider Leap.name: 阔步跳跃 Strider Leap
Strider Leap.description:
烬蛛族先进行一次疾行，然后执行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远}。它进行疾行时可以少于10英尺，且不会自动在其跳远检定中失败。

The jinsul Strides and then performs a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}. It can Stride less than 10 feet and not automatically fail its Long Jump check.

Sworn Blade of Shields.publicNotes:
护盾誓刃以致命的精准挥舞其腿刃对抗敌人。

少数零散的烬蛛族群体已在阿巴隆建立了孤立的基地。大多数是隶属于某名军官的小队士兵，通常由一名秘学者或战术型领袖率领，而他们全都敬重或畏惧此人，并同意为其效命。

泪滴冰渊烬蛛族

本次冒险中的烬蛛族追随一位名叫胡拉的指挥官。胡拉原本正处于即将敌意接管一个由较弱军阀控制的邻近星系的边缘，本可借此大幅扩张他们在近宇的势力——直到漂流危机将他们和其忠诚船员抛进了阿巴隆上空的协约世界星域。坠毁在这颗位于敌后纵深、环境恶劣的世界上后，胡拉和其追随者为躲避残酷的烈日而逃入地下。烬蛛族逐渐在岩石中凿出隧道，有些人的腿刃甚至磨损得变得光滑，最终他们来到了一处地下洞穴——泪滴冰渊。

叛变暗流

随着时间推移，在冰渊的高压环境下，面对自然与超自然的危险物，胡拉和其追随者变得比同族中的其他成员更加虚弱、更加孤立，也更加绝望。胡拉的护盾誓刃自出生起就被训练来保护他们，如今他们抛弃自己所信奉的一切、杀死领袖并逃离此地，去别处寻求救赎与战利品，也只是时间问题。

A sworn blade of shields wields their leg blades against foes with deadly precision.

A few scattered groups of jinsuls have established isolated bases on Aballon. Most are small squads of troopers attached to an officer, usually a mystic or tactical leader who they all respect or fear and have agreed to serve.

Teardrop Ice Well Jinsuls

The jinsuls in this adventure follow a commander called Warlord Hura. On the verge of a hostile takeover of a neighboring system controlled by a weaker warlord, Hura was positioned to significantly expand their holdings in Near Space—until the Drift Crisis spat them and their loyal crew out in Pact Worlds space over Aballon. Crashing on an inhospitable world deep behind enemy lines, Hura and their followers fled underground from the brutal sun. The jinsuls gradually carved tunnels into the rock, some wearing their leg blades down until they were smooth, before they finally emerged into an underground cave—Teardrop Ice Well.

Undercurrents of Mutiny

Over time, under the oppressive conditions of the Ice Well, facing hazards both natural and supernatural, Hura and their followers grew weaker, more isolated, and more desperate than others of their kind. It's only a matter of time before Hura's sworn blades—conditioned from birth to protect them—abandon everything they believe in, kill their leader, and flee in search of salvation and spoils elsewhere.

Captain Phaedra Firestorm.name: 菲德拉·火风暴船长 Captain Phaedra Firestorm

Armored Coat.name: 装甲外套 Armored Coat
Armored Coat.description:
升级： 1

这件大衣由真皮或合成皮革制成，并用装甲板加固。装甲大衣通常会量身定制，以符合穿着者的个人风格。标准版本会作为制服的一部分配发给军官。

Upgrades: 1

This overcoat is made of real or synthetic leather and reinforced with armored plates. Armored coats are often tailor-made to match the wearer's personal style. Standard versions are issued to military officers as part of their uniforms.

Credstick.name: 芯片棒 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探索者》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种受保护的物品上，这种物品被称为信用棒。这些装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是用于便捷携带和花费金钱的一种手段。这些装置的使用方式由所有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻触一下，就能以极其简单的操作接收或支付资金。当需要更严格的安全措施时，它们可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。一些先进（型）信用棒甚至还带有魔法构件，可能需要输入精神密码，或念出特定法术，才能取用其中储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通往个人全部财富的入口，而数额更大的信用点储备通常会安全地保存在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种能在不被追踪的情况下转移信用点的安全且匿名的手段。无论是冒险者还是普通公民，都会经常随身携带一根信用棒，以处理自己可能需要进行的各种购买；与此同时，他们身上通常只会保留恰好足够的信用点，这样即便信用棒遗失，也不至于破产。

协约世界中的个人经常携带信用棒，而其他与协约世界往来的文明也常会将本地资金兑换为信用点，因此也会携带信用棒来花费这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，为每一根指定不同用途；或者，如果他们想进行一笔预定金额的购买，也可以直接把那根棒交易出去。要是一个人身上的信用棒数量变得过于累赘，也很容易在各根棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略的负载量。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Kill Steal.name: 抢人头 Kill Steal
Kill Steal.description:
触发条件 一名盟友成功对一个菲德拉看得见且位于她30尺内的敌人进行一次打击

效果 菲德拉对被该触发性打击伤害的敌人进行一次远程打击。

Trigger An ally successfully Strikes a foe who Phaedra can see and is within 30 feet of her

Effect Phaedra makes a ranged Strike against the foe damaged by the triggering Strike.

Vitriolic Swing.name: 强酸挥击 Vitriolic Swing
Vitriolic Swing.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 烈焰船长朝邻近的敌人吐出尖刻的辱骂，尝试以一次欺瞒检定来[[/act feint]]，或以一次威吓检定对其进行[[/act demoralize]]。然后，她对该生物进行一次近战打击。若虚晃或挫败成功，她的打击会额外造成 @Damage[1d4[mental]] 伤害。

Frequency once per round

Effect Captain Firestorm spits a cutting insult at an adjacent foe, attempting either a Deception check to [[/act feint]] or an Intimidation check to [[/act demoralize]] them. Then, she makes a melee Strike against that creature. If the Feint or Demoralize was successful, her Strike deals an additional @Damage[1d4[mental]] damage.

Cyberwing.name: 赛博之翼 Cyberwing

Steel Wing.name: 钢铁之翼 Steel Wing
Steel Wing.description:
触发条件 一只电子翼成为一次针对其AC的攻击的目标

效果 电子翼将其强化双翼当作护盾使用，针对触发此次反应的攻击获得AC+2处境加值。

Trigger A cyberwing is the target of an attack against its AC

Effect The cyberwing uses its reinforced wings as a shield, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

Shred.name: 撕碎 Shred
Shred.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

效果 赛博飞翼启动其机翼引擎，在金属残影中飞行两次。此移动不会触发反应，且赛博飞翼可以穿过其他生物所占据的空间。它穿过的生物受到 @Damage[1d6[slashing]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:15|basic] 豁免），且除非重击成功，否则这些生物会被推离赛博飞翼5尺。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect The cyberwing revs its wing engines and Flies twice in a blur of metal. This movement doesn't trigger reactions, and the cyberwing can pass through spaces occupied by other creatures. Creatures it passes through take @Damage[1d6[slashing]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:15|basic] save), and on anything but a critical success, the creatures are pushed 5 feet away from the cyberwing.

Cyberwing.publicNotes:
异星卫士谴责将动物的身体与机器部件融合的做法，声称这些实验性原型是对自然的残酷亵渎。支持者则辩称，利用科技强化野生动物，与通过魔法唤醒它们并无不同。这场争论十分激烈，但《星约》的法律仍迟迟不愿接受这种可怖的做法。机械翼是一种简单型号，设计为侦察无人机，能够为自身以及其所携带的敏感信息或货物提供护盾。

锐翼鸟集中分布在阿巴隆寒冷的冰渊中，常常数百只乃至数千只一起栖息，在黎明与黄昏时分出动，到上层台地猎食。

罕见目击

锐翼鸟并不常离开冰渊，因此当它们出现在像奋进城这样的超级综合体附近时，往往会引起骚动。单独一只通常威胁不大，但关于大群锐翼鸟发动凶猛攻击的骇人传闻，以及鲁莽探险者拍下的令人不安的视频，都会把许多游客吓得一见到这些生物就开枪射击。

Xenowardens condemn the practice of fusing the body of an animal with the parts of a machine, claiming that these experimental prototypes are cruel mockeries of nature. Enthusiasts argue using technology to enhance wildlife is no different than awakening them through magic. The debate is heated, but Pact laws remain slow to accept the grisly practice. The cyberwing is a simple model designed as a recon drone that can shield itself and the sensitive information or cargo it carries.

Concentrated in Aballon's frigid Ice Wells, sharpwings roost together by the hundreds or even thousands, emerging at dawn and dusk to hunt for prey in the upper shelves.

Rare Sightings

Sharpwings don't frequently emerge from the Ice Wells, so they can cause a stir when seen near megaplexes such as Striving. They don't pose much of a threat individually, but horror stories of vicious attacks by large flocks of sharpwings and disturbing videos captured by reckless explorers scare many tourists into shooting the creatures on sight.

Spiritual Sinkwell.name: 灵能汇沉井 Spiritual Sinkwell

Soul-Draining Wave.name: 汲魂波 Soul-Draining Wave
Soul-Draining Wave.description:
触发条件 一门死灵系能量炮击中了 Nova Rush

效果 灵性能量袭击货舱，对 B1 区域内的生物造成 @Damage[(1d6+3)[spirit]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:18|basic]）。该闹鬼现象长出数条类似触手的虚空鞭挞，并掷先攻。

Trigger A necromantic energy cannon hits Nova Rush

Effect Spiritual energy assails the cargo hold, dealing @Damage[(1d6+3)[spirit]] damage to creatures in area B1 (@Check[fortitude|dc:18|basic]). The haunt sprouts several tentacle-like void lashes and rolls initiative.

Spiritual Sinkwell.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:16]、@Check[occultism|dc:16]或@Check[religion|dc:16]（受训）以安全驱散虚空能量，@Check[athletics|dc:18]或@Check[thievery|dc:18]（受训）以破坏汇流井；总共需要三次成功。

@Check[arcana|dc:16], @Check[occultism|dc:16], or @Check[religion|dc:16] (trained) to safely disperse the void energy, @Check[athletics|dc:18] or @Check[thievery|dc:18] (trained) to sabotage the sinkwell; three total successes are required.
Spiritual Sinkwell.hazarddescription:
一个死灵能量汇井会虹吸生物的生命精华

A necromantic sinkwell siphons creatures' life essence
Spiritual Sinkwell.reset:
该灵异现象在 1 分钟后停用，且不会再次激活。

The haunt deactivates after 1 minute and does not reactivate.
Spiritual Sinkwell.routine:
（5 个动作）该怨灵对尚未被其 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱} 的目标进行两次虚空鞭打击，然后擒抱它命中的每个生物，且不承受多重攻击减值。它会自动将被擒抱的生物拉向其中心 5 英尺，然后对其中心 10 英尺内的生物造成 @Damage[(1d6+3)[spirit]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:18|basic]）。重度失败的生物会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{精疲力竭 1}。

(5 actions) The haunt makes two void lash Strikes against targets it hasn't yet @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, then Grabs each creature it hit, with no multiple attack penalty. It automatically pulls grabbed creatures 5 feet toward its center, then deals @Damage[(1d6+3)[spirit]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:18|basic]) to creatures within 10 feet of its center. Creatures that critically fail are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

商业 Phase Cutlass.name: 商业 Phase Cutlass
商业 Phase Cutlass.description:
升级： 1

相位弯刀在启动前看起来像一把传统的弧形剑。启动后，它的剑刃会变形成一片闪烁的虚空，其中每一点微小的星光都代表着一个曾被它终结的生命。

Upgrades: 1

A phase cutlass resembles a traditional curved sword until it's powered. Then its blade morphs into a shimmering void, with a tiny star for each life it ended.

Frag Grenade (Commercial).name: 破片手雷（商用） Frag Grenade (Commercial)

商业 Estex Suit.name: 商业 Estex Suit
商业 Estex Suit.description:
升级： 1

这套厚重的飞行服在多层战术织物之间缝入了薄型聚碳板加固。

Upgrades: 1

This bulky flight suit is reinforced with thin polycarbon panels sewn between layers of tactical fabric.
