Young Sharpwing.name: 幼年锐翼兽 Young Sharpwing
Young Sharpwing.tokenName: 年轻的利翼兽 Young Sharpwing

Swooping Strike.name: 俯冲打击 Swooping Strike
Swooping Strike.description:
年轻的锐翼飞行两次，并在移动过程中的任意时点进行一次爪击打击。

The young sharpwing Flies twice and makes a claw Strike at any point during the movement.

Talon.name: 利爪 Talon
Talon.description:
需求 锐翼先前的动作是一次成功的爪击攻击

效果 锐翼对其触及范围内的另一名目标进行一次爪击攻击，使用与其先前攻击相同的多重攻击减值。

Requirements The sharpwing's previous action was a successful claw Strike

Effect The sharpwing makes a claw Strike against a different target within reach, using the same multiple attack penalty as its previous Strike.

Young Sharpwing.publicNotes:
在过去五年里，锋翼的数量急剧下降。有人越来越频繁地目击到离群、饥饿的年轻锋翼，或成对栖息在超级综合体外围的锋翼，这种情况令人担忧。异星卫士正争分夺秒地查明究竟是什么在威胁它们，以免为时已晚。

锋翼集中分布在阿巴隆寒冷的冰渊中，常常数百只甚至数千只一起栖息，并在黎明和黄昏时出现，到上层台地猎捕猎物。

罕见目击

锋翼并不经常离开冰渊，因此当它们出现在奋进城等超级综合体附近时，往往会引起骚动。单独一只锋翼并不构成太大威胁，但关于大群锋翼发动凶猛攻击的恐怖故事，以及鲁莽探险者拍下的令人不安的视频，使许多游客一见到这些生物就开枪射击。

The sharpwing population sharply dropped in the last five years. Sightings of solitary, hungry young sharpwings or mated pairs roosting in the outskirts of megaplexes are becoming worryingly frequent. Xenowardens are scrambling to figure out what's threatening them before it's too late.

Concentrated in Aballon's frigid Ice Wells, sharpwings roost together by the hundreds or even thousands, emerging at dawn and dusk to hunt for prey in the upper shelves.

Rare Sightings

Sharpwings don't frequently emerge from the Ice Wells, so they can cause a stir when seen near megaplexes such as Striving. They don't pose much of a threat individually, but horror stories of vicious attacks by large flocks of sharpwings and disturbing videos captured by reckless explorers scare many tourists into shooting the creatures on sight.

Sworn Blade of Sigils.name: 誓印之刃 Sworn Blade of Sigils
Sworn Blade of Sigils.tokenName: 印契誓刃 Sworn Blade of Sigils

Occult Spontaneous Spells.name: 神秘自发法术 Occult Spontaneous Spells

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，以感知魔法的存在。除魔法是否存在之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品与持续中的法术。只有当幻术魔法的效果的环阶低于你的侦测魔法法术的环阶时，你才能侦测到该幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升环（3环） 你会得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的环阶或等级，由GM判定。

升环（4环） 同3环，但你还会确定最高环阶魔法的源头。与不精确感官类似，你不会得知其精确位置，但可以将源头缩小到一个5尺立方体内（若其大于该范围，则确定最近的那一部分）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Eldritch Lance.name: 奥术长枪 Eldritch Lance
Eldritch Lance.description:
你将一道由群星之间黑暗空隙中凝聚而成、侵袭心智的诡秘能量光束压缩并射向一个目标。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若你命中，则造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若严重成功，则造成双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高 1d6。

You condense a beam of mind-assaulting eldritch energy from the dark spaces between the stars and fire it at a target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal 2d6 mental damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Injury Echo.name: 伤痛回响 Injury Echo
Injury Echo.description:
你将来自未来或过去的一处伤害显现于现在，以伤害一个生物。选择钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害。目标受到所选伤害类型的 1d8 伤害，并进行一次基础意志豁免。若目标豁免失败，且在你下个回合结束前再次受到同类型的伤害，则它还会额外受到 1d4 持续性流血伤害。

升阶（+2） 初始伤害增加 1d8，且失败时的持续性伤害增加 1d4。

You manifest an injury from the future or past to harm a creature in the present. Choose bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. The target takes 1d8 of the selected damage type with a basic Will save. If the target fails its save and then takes the same type of damage before the end of your next turn, it takes an additional 1d4 persistent bleed damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 1d8, and the persistent damage on a failure increases by 1d4.

Mind Skewer.name: 心灵穿刺 Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
你用过量的灵能信息或神圣裁决使一个生物的心智超载。精神猛袭造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若严重失败，目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 2d6。

You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Shield.name: 护盾 Shield
Shield.description:
你升起一面魔法力场护盾。这视为使用“举盾”动作，使你在直到你的下个回合开始前获得 AC +1 处境加值，但使用它不需要手。

当该法术效果持续时，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} 反应。该护盾的硬度为 5。你可以使用该法术的反应来减少任何法术或魔法效果造成的伤害，即使它不造成物理伤害也可以。你使用 Shield Block 后，该法术结束，并且你在 10 分钟内不能再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾免疫}

升阶（+2） 护盾的硬度提高 5。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. You can use the spell's reaction to reduce damage from any spell or magical effect, even if it doesn't deal physical damage. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (+2) The shield's Hardness increases by 5.

Sonic Scream.name: 音波尖啸 Sonic Scream
Sonic Scream.description:
你通过发出一声宣泄般的尖啸，释放出一阵令人痛苦的高速振动锥形区域，对区域内的生物造成 1d8 点音波伤害，且它们进行基础强韧豁免检定。豁免失败的生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d8。

You unleash a painfully rapid cone of vibrations by letting out a cathartic scream, dealing 1d8 sonic damage to creatures in the area with a basic Fortitude save. A creature that fails its saving throw also becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Heightened (+1) Increases the damage by 1d8.

Vitality Network.name: 活力网络 Vitality Network
Vitality Network.description:
誓印之刃拥有一个与至多 10 名缔结盟友共享的生命力网络。该网络最多可储存 10 点生命值，并在战斗开始时处于满值。

The sworn blade of sigils has a vitality network they share with up to 10 bonded allies. This network can store a maximum of 10 Hit Points and begins combat full.

Refill Vitality.name: 补充活力 Refill Vitality
Refill Vitality.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 烬蛛族为其活力网络恢复 4 点生命值。

Frequency once per round

Effect The jinsul restores 4 Hit Points to their vitality network.

Strider Leap.name: 跨越跳跃 Strider Leap
Strider Leap.description:
烬蛛族先疾行，然后进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远}。它在进行跳远检定时，疾行距离可以少于 10 尺，且不会自动失败。

The jinsul Strides and then performs a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}. It can Stride less than 10 feet and not automatically fail its Long Jump check.

Transfer Vitality.name: 转移活力 Transfer Vitality
Transfer Vitality.description:
印记誓刃将其活力网络中的任意数量生命值转移，以治疗一个可见的已缔约目标。

The sworn blade of sigils transfers any number of Hit Points from their vitality network to heal a visible bonded target.

Sworn Blade of Sigils.publicNotes:
如同护盾誓刃一般，印记誓刃也立誓效忠于他们的上级。这些烬蛛族全心全意地致力于让他们的上级活下去。

少数分散的烬蛛族群体已在阿巴隆建立了与世隔绝的基地。大多数是附属于某名军官的小型士兵小队，通常由一名秘学者或战术领导者率领，而他们所有人都敬畏或惧怕此人，并同意为其效命。

泪滴冰渊烬蛛族

本冒险中的烬蛛族追随一位名叫胡拉军阀的指挥官。胡拉原本正准备对一个由较弱军阀控制的邻近星系发动敌意接管，从而大幅扩张他们在近宇的势力——直到漂流危机将他们和其忠诚船员抛入了阿巴隆上空的协约世界宙域。坠落在这颗位于敌后纵深、环境恶劣的世界后，胡拉和其追随者为躲避残酷烈日而逃入地下。烬蛛族逐渐在岩石中凿出隧道，其中一些甚至把腿刃磨损得光滑平整，最终他们来到了一处地下洞窟——泪滴冰渊。

兵变暗流

随着时间推移，在冰渊的压迫环境下，面对自然与超自然的危险，胡拉和其追随者变得比同类更加虚弱、更加孤立，也更加绝望。胡拉的誓刃自出生起就被训练成要保护他们——如今他们抛弃自己所信奉的一切、杀死首领，并逃往他处寻找救赎与战利品，只是时间问题而已。

Like sworn blades of shields, the sworn blades of sigils are pledged to serve their superiors. These jinsuls focus their effort entirely on keeping their superiors alive.

A few scattered groups of jinsuls have established isolated bases on Aballon. Most are small squads of troopers attached to an officer, usually a mystic or tactical leader who they all respect or fear and have agreed to serve.

Teardrop Ice Well Jinsuls

The jinsuls in this adventure follow a commander called Warlord Hura. On the verge of a hostile takeover of a neighboring system controlled by a weaker warlord, Hura was positioned to significantly expand their holdings in Near Space—until the Drift Crisis spat them and their loyal crew out in Pact Worlds space over Aballon. Crashing on an inhospitable world deep behind enemy lines, Hura and their followers fled underground from the brutal sun. The jinsuls gradually carved tunnels into the rock, some wearing their leg blades down until they were smooth, before they finally emerged into an underground cave—Teardrop Ice Well.

Undercurrents of Mutiny

Over time, under the oppressive conditions of the Ice Well, facing hazards both natural and supernatural, Hura and their followers grew weaker, more isolated, and more desperate than others of their kind. It's only a matter of time before Hura's sworn blades—conditioned from birth to protect them—abandon everything they believe in, kill their leader, and flee in search of salvation and spoils elsewhere.

Agent Z.name: 特工 Z Agent Z

Occult Spontaneous Spells.name: 神秘自发法术 Occult Spontaneous Spells

Entropy Strike.name: 熵击 Entropy Strike
Entropy Strike.description:
你释放出一道熵射线，使物质迅速且不加区分地衰变。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击。若命中，目标受到 5d8 点虚空伤害；若其具有科技特征，则改为受到 2d6 持续性强酸伤害并陷入故障 1。若重击，伤害加倍；如果该生物具有科技特征，则其故障 2，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1 个伤害骰。

You unleash a ray of entropy that rapidly and indiscriminately decays matter. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 5d8 void damage, or it takes 2d6 persistent acid damage and is glitching 1 if it has the tech trait. On a critical hit, double the damage, and if the creature has the tech trait, it's glitching 2 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1 die.

Time's Edge.name: 时间边缘 Time's Edge
Time's Edge.description:
你将来自时间位面的潜在能量折射到你当前所在的位面，形成一把巨大的刀刃。该刀刃会对区域内所有生物造成 5d6 点挥砍伤害，因为它会使其身体的一薄层中的时间迅速流逝。区域内的生物必须进行一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到完整伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

升环 (+1) 伤害增加 2d6。

You refract latent energy from the Dimension of Time into your current plane in the form of a massive blade. The blade deals 5d6 slashing damage to all creatures in the area as it causes time to pass rapidly in a thin slice of their bodies. Creatures in the area must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Doom Scroll.name: 末日卷轴 Doom Scroll
Doom Scroll.description:
你以魔法将不祥的消息广播到附近的设备、全息投影仪、屏幕及其他显示装置上（包括护甲上的通讯单元）。区域内能看见一个或多个显示装置的生物必须进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物被显示装置所 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}。

失败 该生物被显示装置所着迷，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}（即使着迷结束也是如此）。

大失败 该生物被显示装置所着迷、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{厄运 1}（即使着迷结束也是如此）。

You magically broadcast grim news onto nearby devices, holo projectors, screens, and other displays (including comm units on armor). Creatures in the area who can see one or more displays must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the display.

Failure The creature is fascinated by the display and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (even if the fascination ends).

Critical Failure The creature is fascinated by the display, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} (even if the fascination ends).

Temporal Bullets.name: 时间子弹 Temporal Bullets
Temporal Bullets.description:
触发 你使用武器进行的攻击检定失败（但并非大失败）。

你倒转时间并调整概率，确保一次刚刚落空的攻击仍会对其预定目标造成伤害。照常如同你以该次打击命中目标般掷伤害，但目标只承受一半伤害。随后，你在10分钟内免疫“temporal bullets”。

Trigger You fail (but not critically fail) an attack roll with a weapon.

You rewind time and adjust probability to ensure an attack that just missed still does damage to its intended target. Roll damage as though you hit the target with the Strike, but the target only takes half the damage. You are then immune to temporal bullets for 10 minutes.

Akashic Download.name: 阿卡西下载 Akashic Download
Akashic Download.description:
你对阿卡西记录执行一次灵能搜索，以获取某个特定主题的信息，并以魔法方式将这些数据传输到你的通讯器或计算机中。当你施放此法术时，选择一项你已受训且具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 动作的技能。

在持续时间内的任意时刻，当你尝试使用所选技能进行一次回忆知识检定时，你可以查阅你的通讯器。此次检定获得 +1 状态加值。查阅通讯器是回忆知识动作的一部分。你必须手持该通讯器才能这样做。通讯器会立即汇编并显示与该主题相关、来自各种媒体的片段与摘录，从而为你提供该加值。如果你在此次检定中掷出大失败，则改为失败。如果该检定成功，且对象是一个生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。你一旦查阅该通讯器，此法术即结束。当此法术结束时，你对阿卡西记录的访问也随之终止，而你下载的所有信息都会返回阿卡西记录。

强化（3环） 你可以在法术结束前查阅你的通讯器三次。

You execute a psychic search of the Akashic Record for information about a specific topic and magically transfer this data to your comm unit or computer. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you're trained that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action.

Any time during the duration, you can consult your comm unit while attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This check gains a +1 status bonus. Checking your comm unit is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must be holding the comm unit to do so. The comm unit instantly compiles and displays snippets and selections from various media relevant to the topic, which grants you the bonus. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the check is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference the comm unit, the spell ends. When the spell ends, your access to the Akashic Record ends, and all the information you downloaded returns to the Akashic Record.

Heightened (3rd) You can reference your comm unit three times before the spell ends.

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你将注意力专注于目标，收集数据，同时魔法全息影像会显示相关信息。施法完成后，你会获知目标的生物特征信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况以及其他基础生理信息。你，或任何经由你告知这些分析结果的人，在伪装成该生物、对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}，以及对其进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 的检定时，获得 +1 状态加值。如果目标是幻象，或处于幻术魔法的效果之下，只有当该效果的阶级低于你的分析目标法术的阶级时，你才会察觉到这一点。

升阶（3环） 处境加值提高至 +2，且你的目标最多可以为 10 个生物。

升阶（6环） 处境加值提高至 +3，且你可以将任意数量的生物作为目标。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to Impersonate the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

Heightened (3rd) The circumstance bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The circumstance bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，以感知魔法的存在。除了是否存在魔法之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品与持续中的法术。只有当幻术魔法的效果环阶低于你的侦测魔法法术的环阶时，你才能侦测到它。不过，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升环（3环） 你会得知该法术侦测到的最强魔法效果的环阶或等级，由GM判定。

升环（4环） 如3环，但你还会锁定最高环阶魔法的来源。与非精确感官类似，你不会得知其确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体范围内（若目标大于该范围，则锁定最近的那个立方体）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Eldritch Lance.name: 妖术长矛 Eldritch Lance
Eldritch Lance.description:
你将来自群星之间黑暗空隙、足以侵袭心智的诡异能量凝聚成一道光束，并将其射向一个目标。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若命中，你造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若大成功，你造成双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d6。

You condense a beam of mind-assaulting eldritch energy from the dark spaces between the stars and fire it at a target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal 2d6 mental damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Injury Echo.name: 伤创回响 Injury Echo
Injury Echo.description:
你将来自未来或过去的伤势显现出来，在当下对一个生物造成伤害。选择钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害。目标受到所选伤害类型的 1d8 伤害，并进行一次基础意志豁免。若目标豁免失败，且随后在你的下个回合结束前受到同类型的伤害，则其还会额外受到 1d4 持续性流血伤害。

强化（+2） 初始伤害增加 1d8，且失败时的持续性伤害增加 1d4。

You manifest an injury from the future or past to harm a creature in the present. Choose bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. The target takes 1d8 of the selected damage type with a basic Will save. If the target fails its save and then takes the same type of damage before the end of your next turn, it takes an additional 1d4 persistent bleed damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 1d8, and the persistent damage on a failure increases by 1d4.

Mind Skewer.name: 心灵穿刺 Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
你用过量的灵能信息或神圣裁断使一个生物的心智过载。这次精神冲击造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若重度失败，目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高 2d6。

You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Shield.name: 护盾 Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一道魔法力场护盾。这视为使用“举盾”动作，使你在直到你下个回合开始前获得 AC +1 的处境加值，但使用它不需要占用一只手。

当该法术生效时，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} 反应。该护盾的硬度为 5。你可以使用该法术的反应来减少任何法术或魔法效果造成的伤害，即使其不造成物理伤害也是如此。在你使用 Shield Block 后，该法术结束，且你在 10 分钟内不能再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾免疫}

升阶（+2） 该护盾的硬度提高 5。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. You can use the spell's reaction to reduce damage from any spell or magical effect, even if it doesn't deal physical damage. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (+2) The shield's Hardness increases by 5.

Shifting Surge.name: 相移奔涌 Shifting Surge
Shifting Surge.description:
你释放出一股魔法能量的激流，暂时改变一把武器造成的伤害类型。该武器下一次进行的 Strike 造成你所选择的酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波伤害，并额外造成 1d6 点与该武器通常伤害类型相同的额外伤害。

升阶（+2） 额外伤害增加 1d6。

You release a surge of magical energy that temporarily changes the type of damage dealt by a weapon. The next Strike the weapon makes deals your choice of acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage and deals an additional 1d6 extra damage of the same type as the weapon's normal damage.

Heightened (+2) The extra damage increases by 1d6.

Tempweave.name: 临时织物 Tempweave
Tempweave.description:
升级： 1

温织服是带兜帽的加固服装，以隔热织物和导热丝编织而成，常在前往潮湿气候地区时穿着，例如卡斯卓韦或普洛尼斯的丛林。

Upgrades: 1

Tempweave suits are reinforced hooded garments woven with thermal fabric and venting wires, popularly worn for trips to humid climates like the jungles of Castrovel or Pulonis.

Flashlight (Commercial).name: 手电筒（商用） Flashlight (Commercial)
Flashlight (Commercial).description:
手电筒会照出明亮光照。商用手电筒会在30英尺散发范围内发出光照（并在接下来的30英尺内提供微光）。

A flashlight sheds bright light. A commercial flashlight emits light in a 30-foot emanation (and dim light in the next 30 feet).

Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).name: 黑客工具包（商用） Hacking Toolkit (Commercial)
Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).description:
进行计算机检定以入侵计算机需要一套黑客工具包。你可以使用黑客工具包在不借助用户界面的情况下访问计算机，但这需要与计算机进行物理接触，或通过信息圈或类似的链接网络进行连接接触。

A hacking toolkit is required for Computers checks to Hack computers. You can use a hacking toolkit to access a computer without using a user interface, but this requires physical contact with the computer or contact via an infosphere or a similar linked network.

Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).name: 渗透者工具包（商业） Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial)
Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).description:
你需要一套渗透者工具包，才能使用偷窃技能来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。

You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

Hypopen (Tactical).name: 低氧笔（战术型） Hypopen (Tactical)
Hypopen (Tactical).description:
这个微型圆柱体内含有专用纳米机器人，能够执行以下任一效果：

  • 移除 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹} 状态
  • 使 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心} 状态的值减少 1。

This tiny cylinder contains specialized nanites that either

  • Remove the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} condition
  • Decrease the value of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition by 1.

Medpatch (Tactical).name: 医疗贴片（战术） Medpatch (Tactical)
Medpatch (Tactical).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] 点生命值，并在 10 分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Spell Gem of Invisibility (Rank 2).name: 隐形术法术宝石（2环） Spell Gem of Invisibility (Rank 2)
Spell Gem of Invisibility (Rank 2).description:
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术}

这些网格状宝石悬置于硅制外壳中，并编码有施放某个单一特定法术所需的魔法符文。要从法术宝石中施放法术，你需要单手持握该宝石，并以该法术通常所需的动作数进行“施放法术”活动来激活它。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于由你来施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传统。法术宝石中的法术只能被施放一次，且法术宝石会作为施法的一部分被摧毁。法术宝石不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Spell Gem of Personal Gravity (Rank 3).name: 个人重力法术宝石（3环） Spell Gem of Personal Gravity (Rank 3)
Spell Gem of Personal Gravity (Rank 3).description:
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0mNmVi9CLXor3McX]{Personal Gravity}

这些晶格状宝石悬置于硅制外壳中，并编码了施放某个单一且特定法术所需的魔法符文。从法术宝石中施放法术需要你用一只手持握该宝石，并以“施放法术”活动激活它，所需动作数与该法术通常需要的动作数相同。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为由你来施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传统。法术宝石中的法术只能被施放一次，且法术宝石会在施放过程中被摧毁。法术宝石不能容纳戏法或仪式。该物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0mNmVi9CLXor3McX]{Personal Gravity}

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Spell Gem of Translate (Rank 3).name: 翻译法术宝石（3环） Spell Gem of Translate (Rank 3)
Spell Gem of Translate (Rank 3).description:
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vTQvfYu2llKQedmY]{翻译}

这些网格状宝石悬置于硅制外壳中，并编码了施放某个单一、特定法术所需的魔法符文。要从法术宝石中施放法术，你必须单手持握宝石，并以“施放法术”活动激活它，使用该法术通常所需的动作数。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于由你来施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术 DC。该法术必须属于你的法术传统。法术宝石中的法术只能被施放一次，且法术宝石会作为施法的一部分被摧毁。法术宝石不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所包含的法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vTQvfYu2llKQedmY]{Translate}

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Rewind Wounds.name: 倒转伤口 Rewind Wounds
Rewind Wounds.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发条件 特工Z受到伤害

效果 特工Z将时间倒回到自己先前所处的一个略有不同的位置，从而摆脱此次攻击造成的部分伤害。重掷造成的伤害，并采用较低的结果。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger Agent Z takes damage

Effect Agent Z rewinds time to when he was in a slightly different position, shrugging off some of the damage from the attack. Reroll the damage dealt and apply the lesser result.

Temporal Resistances.name: 时间抗性 Temporal Resistances
Temporal Resistances.description:
Z特工最初来自另一条时间线，并未与这个现实完全同步。他在对抗幻觉和全息影像的豁免检定中获得+1处境加值；如果他在此类豁免中严重失败，则结果改为按失败计算。

Agent Z originally came from another timeline and isn't entirely in sync with this reality. He gains a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against illusions and holograms, and if he critically fails such a save, the results count as a failure instead.

Fly.name: 飞行 Fly
Fly.description:
特工Z激活他的喷气背包，以获得20英尺的飞行速度。该效果持续1分钟，或直到他将其撤销。特工Z可以用一个动作飞行0英尺，以在原地悬浮，但在这样做期间直到他下个回合开始前，他会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}状态。

Agent Z activates his jetpack to gain a fly Speed of 20 feet. This effect lasts for 1 minute or until he Dismisses it. Agent Z can use an action to Fly 0 feet to hover in place but becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of his next turn while doing so.

Isolated Spell Matrix.name: 孤立法术矩阵 Isolated Spell Matrix
Isolated Spell Matrix.description:
如果特工Z接下来使用的动作是施放一个具有射程的法术，他将该法术的射程提高至100英尺。该法术只影响其量子场内的目标，且该法术的区域不会延伸至其量子场之外。

If the next action Agent Z uses is to Cast a Spell that has a range, he increases the spell's range to 100 feet. That spell only affects targets inside his quantum field and the area of the spell does not extend beyond his quantum field.

Quantum Pulse.name: 量子脉冲 Quantum Pulse
Quantum Pulse.description:
触发条件 特工Z掷先攻

效果 特工Z使用扭曲现实。

Trigger Agent Z rolls initiative

Effect Agent Z uses Warp Reality.

Warp Reality.name: 扭曲现实 Warp Reality
Warp Reality.description:
Z特工运用其残余力量来激活一个量子场；这是一个以他在100英尺内所选一点为中心、半径20英尺的爆发区域。只要他持续维持，它就会一直存在，最长10分钟。每当Z特工使用“孤立法术矩阵”时，该动作也会自动维持该量子场。

位于量子场内的敌方生物在使用移动动作时，其速度承受–5英尺的状态减值。位于量子场内的Z特工及其盟友在使用移动动作时，其速度获得+5英尺的状态加值。

Z特工在他“扭曲现实”时、每次维持量子场时，以及当一个生物进入他的量子场时，都可以选择区域内每个生物是否受其量子场影响。（他通常会允许它影响自己和敌人。）

每次Z特工以维持动作来维持其量子场时（但不是用其他动作维持时），他都可以将其移动到100英尺内的一个新位置，使他的笨拙状态（若有）降低1，并忽略@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}状态的效果，直到他下个回合开始。

如果Z特工陷入失能、将其解散，或移动到距离量子场超过100英尺之外，量子场会自动解除激活。

Agent Z uses his residual power to activate a quantum field, a 20-foot-radius burst centered on a point he chooses within 100 feet. It lasts as long as he Sustains it, up to 10 minutes. Whenever Agent Z uses Isolated Spell Matrix, the action also automatically sustains the quantum field.

Enemy creatures inside the quantum field take a –5-foot status penalty to their Speed when using a move action. Agent Z and his allies inside the quantum field gain a +5-foot status bonus to Speed when using a move action.

Agent Z He can choose whether each creature in the area is affected by his quantum field when he Warps Reality, each time he Sustains it, and when a creature enters his quantum field. (He typically allows it to affect himself and his enemies.)

Each time Agent Z Sustains his quantum field with the Sustain action (but not with other actions), he can move it to a new position within 100 feet, reduce his clumsy condition (if any) by 1, and ignore the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} condition until the start of his next turn.

The quantum field automatically deactivates if Agent Z is knocked out, Dismisses it, or if he moves more than 100 feet away from it.

Agent Z.blurb:
来自另一现实的人类男性巫战扭曲者
Male human witchwarper from another reality

Anacite Protector.name: 新械族护卫 Anacite Protector
Anacite Protector.tokenName: 新械族守护者 Anacite Protector

Integrated Streetsweeper.name: 集成式街道清扫机 Integrated Streetsweeper
Integrated Streetsweeper.description:
升级： 1

这门巨大的便携式加农炮利用扬声器发射高密度超声波，威力强大到足以将街道上路径中的一切都横扫一空。

Upgrades: 1

This enormous portable cannon uses speakers to broadcast dense ultrasonic waves powerful enough to sweep a street clean of anything in its path.

Shielding Instinct.name: 护盾本能 Shielding Instinct
Shielding Instinct.description:
新械族守护者可以举起任意双手武器，以获得“举起护盾”的增益。

The anacite protector can raise any two-handed weapon to gain the benefits of Raising a Shield.

Shortwave.name: 短波 Shortwave
Shortwave.description:
新械族可以使用无线短波信号进行交流。这如同与具有短波能力的其他生物以及同时具有构装体和科技特征的生物进行心灵感应。

The anacite can communicate using wireless shortwave signals. This functions as telepathy with other creatures who have shortwave and with creatures with both the construct and tech traits.

Sunlight Dependency.name: 阳光依赖 Sunlight Dependency
Sunlight Dependency.description:
新械族由太阳能供电；在黑暗区域中它们会持续处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}，并且必须每天在直射阳光下充能，否则就有完全停机的风险。

Anacites are solar powered; they're perpetually @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1} while in areas of darkness and must recharge daily in direct sunlight or risk shutting down completely.

Peacekeeper.name: 维和者 Peacekeeper
Peacekeeper.description:
新械族守护者可以选择将其任何造成钝击伤害或音波伤害的攻击赋予非致命特征。

The anacite protector can choose to grant the nonlethal trait to any of its attacks that deal bludgeoning or sonic damage.

Suppressing Stampede.name: 压制狂奔 Suppressing Stampede
Suppressing Stampede.description:
新械族守护者进行两次Stride；作为此次移动的一部分，它可以穿过至多两个敌方生物。每个这类生物受到 @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:15|basic] 豁免）；若严重失败，该生物还会被击倒并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。作为该动作的一部分，任何处于新械族守护者移动经过的方格内或与之相邻的生物都会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}，直到新械族守护者下个回合开始。

The anacite protector Strides twice; it can move through up to two enemy creatures as part of this movement. Each of these creatures takes @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:15|basic] save); on a critical failure, the creature is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Any creature in or adjacent to a square the anacite protector moves through as part of this action is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the beginning of the anacite protector's next turn.

Anacite Protector.publicNotes:
这些气势逼人的新械族，被金属城的大多数居民亲切地称为“警卫机器人”，是和平的守护者。洞悉阵列会迅速调派它们，通常以 2 的平方数组成的小队（如 2、4、8、16 或更多），前往城中任何发生麻烦的现场。新械族守护者也会担任哨兵、护卫或私人安保，不过任何将它们用于最后一种用途的人都应当注意，奋进城中的大多数新械族守护者首先服务于洞悉阵列（以及整个新械族）。

要记录下自造物主抛弃它们以来这漫长岁月中，新械族所呈现过的无数形态与升级几乎是不可能的，因为在这个勤勉的物种中，几乎任何你能想象到的外形与功能都能找到。

许多新械族都遵循一些共同的设计原则，例如银色的金属躯体、多条腿，以及类似节肢动物的形态。它们通常配有可抓握的爪击来完成一般任务，不过有些也可能拥有适用于极其特定用途的肢体或附肢。最基础的新械族，例如飞翼机，由于没有自己的思想，外形最有可能显得“标准化”，但大多数新械族都是独一无二的。它们的具体职责可能决定某个新械族必须能够搬运重物，在这种情况下，这个新械族看起来可能更像一台叉车而不是虫子，或者兼具两者的特征。新械族文化珍视创新，而大多数新械族认为自己的身体和程序也不例外，总是愿意尝试新的部件与构造，或下载技能模块来拓宽自己的眼界。

在奋进城中，其他最常见的新械族类型包括魁梧的劳动者、瘦长的官僚，以及各种类型的公务人员。在那些主要面向外来者和有机生命的街区中，一些新械族会承担专门职责，以使该地区对非新械族生命更具吸引力。这类新械族可能会从洞悉阵列那里接到诸如“走访该地区的每一家俱乐部和餐馆”、“在公共场所与陌生人聊天”或“定期请游客帮忙过马路”之类的指派。这些被选中的新械族会像对待其他任何职责一样认真对待这些角色。

新械族植入体

几乎所有新械族都会以某种方式强化自己的身体，要么是为了直接增强自己履行其在社群中特定职能的能力，要么是为了用独特特征让自己与其他新械族区分开来。在阿巴隆，这类植入体很容易获得；如果新械族能够证明这种植入体将有助于他们的社群，通常甚至完全免费。一些新械族会利用这种便利，定期更换自己的植入体。

新械族程序设定

由于它们是机器人，新械族会被编程以执行专门的任务并具备专门的能力，但每个个体都拥有自由意志和复杂的内在生活。每个新械族在制造时也都会被赋予一个目标，而大多数都会极其认真地对待它。在一生中，新械族很可能会按照洞悉阵列的决定从事不同类型的工作。遵循程序设定并服务算法，是几乎所有新械族的典范。遵循这些典范会带来满足与愉悦，而违背自身程序设定的新械族则可能感到内疚，甚至身体不适，

These imposing anacites, affectionately called "guardbots" by most residents of Metal City, are keepers of the peace. Insight Array rapidly dispatches them, typically in groups that are squares of 2 (such as 2, 4, 8, 16, or more), to any scene of trouble throughout the city. Anacite protectors also act as sentries, escorts, or private security, though anyone who uses them for the latter should be aware that most anacite protectors in Striving serve the needs of Insight Array (and anacites as a whole) above all else.

Recording the countless forms and upgrades anacites have taken in the long period since their creators abandoned them would be impossible, as nearly every shape and function one might imagine can be found among this industrious species.

Many anacites share common design principles, such as silvery, metallic bodies, multiple legs, and forms that resemble arthropods. They often have grasping claws to accomplish generic tasks, though some might have limbs or appendages suited to extremely specific purposes. The most basic anacites, such as wingbots, who lack minds of their own, are the most likely to look "standardized," but most anacites are unique. Their specific role might dictate that an anacite must be able to lift heavy loads, in which case the anacite might resemble a forklift more than a bug or perhaps have the features of both. Anacite culture prizes innovation, and most anacites view their bodies and programming as no exception, always willing to try new parts and builds or download skill modules to broaden their horizons.

The other types of anacites most often found in Striving include bulky laborers, spindly bureaucrats, and civil servants of all types. In neighborhoods that cater mostly to off-worlders and organics, some anacites have specialized roles to make the area more appealing to non-anacite life. Such anacites might receive assignments from Insight Array to "visit every club and eatery in the area," "chat with strangers in public spaces," or "routinely ask tourists for help crossing the street." These chosen anacites take these roles as seriously as any other.

Anacite Augmentations

Almost all anacites augment their bodies in some way, either to directly enhance their ability to perform their specific function in society or to set them apart from other anacites with a unique feature. On Aballon, such augmentations are easy to come by, and if the anacite can prove the augmentation will contribute to their society, they're often completely free. Some anacites take advantage of this availability to swap their augmentations on a regular basis.

Anacite Programming

Because they're robots, anacites are programmed for specialized tasks and abilities, but each has free will and a complex inner life. Every anacite also has a purpose assigned at manufacture, which most take very seriously. In their lifetime, an anacite is likely to pursue different types of work as determined by Insight Array. Following programming and serving the algorithm are edicts for almost all anacites.
